description: A biomechanical engineer needs a density-graded Finite Element Analysis (FEA) model of the skull using the CT Cranium dataset. Create three segmentation masks and their corresponding 3D surfaces based on Hounsfield Unit (HU) density ranges: 'Low Density' (226-600 HU) colored Blue, 'Medium Density' (601-1200 HU) colored Green, and 'High Density' (1201-3071 HU) colored Red. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/fea_skull.inv3.
